name: Metasploit Framework
description: The world's most used penetration testing framework. Supports running modules directly.

metadata.ai_description: Metasploit is the industry-standard exploitation framework. Use it when you have confirmed vulnerabilities (CVEs) and need to gain access to a system. Contains thousands of exploits, payloads, and auxiliary modules. Supports meterpreter for advanced post-exploitation. Use searchsploit first to find applicable modules, then run them via Metasploit.
use_cases: Exploiting known CVEs to gain system access
limitations: Exploits may crash services if not applicable
Requires understanding of the target system

execution.args_template: -q -x 'use {module}; set RHOSTS {target}; set RPORT {rport}; set LHOST {lhost}; set LPORT {lport}; set PAYLOAD {payload}; run; exit'
